briefs.summary: 每日預設：10 首做約 30–35 分鐘。長度換算：30 分鐘＝8–10 首；45 分鐘＝12–14 首；60 分鐘＝15–18 首。選定概念圖後，只以同一 reference 製作白天、黃昏、夜晚與雨天微動畫。

items.purpose: 30 分鐘 YouTube Lo-fi 長片
items.text: Track 1/10 — "Opening the Window". Create a 3:00–3:30 instrumental lo-fi track for one cohesive 30-minute CapyChill album titled "海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay". Mood: warm, unhurried, quietly optimistic. 70 BPM, 4/4, Rhodes piano and felt piano, warm restrained bass and soft brushed or tape-muted drums. Composition: simple four-chord welcome; introduce a small variation after 60 seconds, a calm B section near 1:30, then return to the main motif. Mix for long listening: no vocals, no spoken words, no dramatic drops, no piercing highs, no recognizable melody, no artist imitation. Leave gentle headroom and end cleanly with a 4–6 second natural tail. Environmental texture: soft sea breeze and distant water ambience, very low in the mix. This track must feel related to the other nine tracks without reusing the same lead melody.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create a 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk on the right third, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay; use peach sunset, muted ocean blue, warm walnut with clear golden-hour sky and calm sea. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, desk objects, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create a 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk on the right third, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 月光晚安・Moonlit Capy; use indigo, moon cream, very low amber light with quiet moon and sparse stars over the same sea. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, desk objects, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.

Motion only: natural slow breathing, one soft blink, one tiny ear twitch, minimal pencil-writing motion, subtle mug steam; soft daylight, slow sea reflections and a light curtain breeze. Make first and last frame visually compatible for looping. No new objects, no morphing, no extra limbs, no moving furniture, no text, no logos, no sound dialogue.
